author.bio: Professor of Computer Science at Université catholique de Louvain, Belgium, co-founder http://tessares.net
author.name: Olivier Bonaventure

content.text: Congratulations again to all #MPTCP developers lead by @cpaasch11 Their hard work during a decade has demonstrated the many benefits that multipath transport protocols can bring in the Internet. https://www.sigcomm.org/content/sigcomm-networking-systems-award
